index.html.summary: Full HTML converted into a single-screen, no-scroll layout with compact hero, grid-based cards, and a simplified footer CTA.

script.js.summary: Full JS simplified to remove scroll behavior and keep only the CTA celebration effects, sparkles, and confetti for the single-page layout.

styles.css.summary: Full CSS changed to lock the page to one viewport, remove scrolling, and compress all sections into a responsive grid that fits on a single screen.
